content.text:
All candidate files have been verified. Here is the complete answer:

## Construct sites

- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/agent_loop.rs`: Constructs both `LoopAuditEvent::ToolCallRequested { ... }` and `LoopAuditEvent::ToolCallResult { ... }` inside `AgentLoop::run` (lines ~291 and ~305 respectively) — one pair per tool call in the dispatch loop, emitting the pre-dispatch request event and the post-dispatch result event via `sink.emit(...)`.

---

**All other referenced files are excluded:**

- `crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/tool_enforcement.rs` — `EnforcedAuditSink::emit` only *pattern-matches* on `ToolCallRequested` (in a `match` arm guard) and constructs only `PolicyDenial`.
- `crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/audit_writer.rs` — `emit_loop_event` is a pass-through forwarder (`self.inner.emit(event)`); constructs nothing.
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/session.rs` — constructs only `SessionSpawn` and `SessionClose`.
- `crates/orbit-agent/examples/tool_allowlist.rs` — only pattern-matches on `PolicyDenial`; no construction of the two target variants.
